2604.13367.title: A 3D SAM-Based Progressive Prompting Framework for Multi-Task Segmentation of Radiotherapy-induced Normal Tissue Injuries in Limited-Data Settings
2604.13367.paper_summary: Radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury is a clinically important complication, and accurate segmentation of injury regions from medical images could facilitate disease assessment, treatment planning, and longitudinal monitoring. However, automatic segmentation of these lesions remains largely unexplored because of limited voxel-level annotations and substantial heterogeneity across injury types, lesion size, and imaging modality. To address this gap, we curate a dedicated head-and-neck radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury dataset covering three manifestations: osteoradionecrosis (ORN), cerebral edema (CE), and cerebral radiation necrosis (CRN). We further propose a 3D SAM-based progressive prompting framework for multi-task segmentation in limited-data settings. The framework progressively incorporates three complementary prompts: text prompts for task-aware adaptation, dose-guided box prompts for coarse localization, and click prompts for iterative refinement. A small-target focus loss is introduced to improve local prediction and boundary delineation for small and sparse lesions. Experiments on ORN, CE, and CRN demonstrate that the proposed method achieves reliable segmentation performance across diverse injury types and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
2604.13367.paper_summary_zh: 放射治療引起的正常組織損傷是一種臨床上重要的併發症，準確地從醫學影像中分割損傷區域可以促進疾病評估、治療計劃和縱向監測。<lb/>然而，由於體素級標註的有限性以及損傷類型、病變大小和影像模態之間的顯著異質性，自動分割這些病變仍然在很大程度上未被探索。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們整理了一個專門的頭頸部放射治療引起的正常組織損傷數據集，涵蓋三種表現形式：骨放射壞死（ORN）、腦水腫（CE）和腦放射壞死（CRN）。<lb/>我們進一步提出了一種基於3D SAM的漸進提示框架，用於有限數據環境下的多任務分割。<lb/>該框架逐步整合了三個互補的提示：用於任務感知適應的文本提示、用於粗略定位的劑量引導框提示，以及用於迭代細化的點擊提示。<lb/>引入了一種小目標聚焦損失，以改善小而稀疏病變的局部預測和邊界 delineation。<lb/>在ORN、CE和CRN上的實驗表明，所提出的方法在各種損傷類型中實現了可靠的分割性能，並且超越了最先進的方法。
2604.13367.author: Caiwen Jiang et.al.
2604.13367.authors: Caiwen Jiang, Lei Zeng, Wei Liu
